_schema: E99 1.3B LM-CMA candidate records. Field names align with docs/HANDOFF_E97_GDN2_CMAES_20260528.md (dim, n_heads, n_state, depth, lr, batch_size + model-specific expansion). Extended with the production-LM-path fields (level, layer_kwargs, dtype) needed to instantiate each candidate via train.py + ndm/models/ladder_lm.py. Emitted by experiments/e99_1p3b_sanity/e99_lm_sanity.py; sanity verified 2026-06-05 on idle RTX 6000 Ada GPUs.

production_path.note: typed-gdn2-lm / e98-cma-lm are wired into train.py via --head_type_logits / --corner_mixture / --lam_max / --beta_max / --igain_max / --knob_lr_mult and the new layer_kwargs plumbing in LadderLM (commit on branch wg/agent-1116/wire-e99-e98). fla-gdn already conformed to the LadderLM layer protocol unchanged.

typed-gdn2-lm.role: E99 typed Emender (PRIMARY) — native GDN-2 heads + nonlinear specialist mix
typed-gdn2-lm.discovered_form: softmax(head_type_logits) ~= [0.822 gdn2_recall, 0.002 track, 0.006 count, 0.001 latch, 0.168 nonlin] -> the 40:8 / 5:1 GDN2:nonlinear ratio from typed-gdn-2-head, preserved at scale. At n_heads=96 -> ~79 GDN-2 / ~16 nonlinear heads.

fla-gdn.source: paper/review/THROUGHPUT.md FLA-GDN 1.352B baseline; same native delta-memory backbone the typed GDN-2 heads run

e98-cma-lm.discovered_form: split-gate + spread-init + corner_mixture + knob_lr_mult=5.38 from the 8M cma-capability winner; dim/depth/n_heads re-derived to 1.3B-class (the report's e98-scale-run starting point).

reused_baselines_from_handoff._note: Existing prior 1.3B controls whose local train paths already exist; reuse without inventing new release paths. Configs from docs/HANDOFF_E97_GDN2_CMAES_20260528.md best-config table and paper/review/THROUGHPUT.md. To be wired only by run-matched-1-3b if their load paths are reusable.
